transcript:
Speaker A (AI): Where are you?
Speaker B (Human): I go to home?
Speaker A (AI): You mean, "I am going home."
Speaker B (Human): Yes, I am going home. I am very hurry.
Speaker A (AI): "I am in a hurry" is the correct way.
Speaker B (Human): Okay, I am in a hurry. रुको तुम इंग्लिश इतनी आसानी से सिखा रहे हो, तुम हो कौन? [Wait, you are teaching English so easily, who are you?]
Speaker A (AI): मैं MySivi की AI teacher हूँ, जो तुम्हें अपनी इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव और फ्लूएंट करने में मदद करेगी। [I am MySivi's AI teacher, who will help you improve and become fluent in your English.]
Speaker B (Human): Okay, but have no moneys.
Speaker A (AI): You mean "I have no money", but don't worry. सिर्फ ₹1 में इसका ट्रायल लेके देखो और सिर्फ 15 दिन रेगुलर प्रैक्टिस करो और तुम्हें अपने कॉन्फिडेंस में फर्क नजर आएगा। [You mean "I have no money", but don't worry. Take its trial for just ₹1 and practice regularly for just 15 days, and you will see a difference in your confidence.]
Speaker B (Human): सच में? मैं अभी डाउनलोड करता हूँ। [Really? I will download it right now.]
on_screen_text:
Where are you
I go to home?
I am going home.
I am very hurry.
I am in a hurry, is the correct
रुको तुम इंग्लिश इतनी आसानी से सिखा रहे हो [Wait, you are teaching English so easily]
Tum ho kaun? [Who are you?]
MySivi ki AI teacher [MySivi's AI teacher]
aur fluent karne me madad karegi. [and will help make fluent.]
but have no moneys.
You mean I have
MySivi Premium ₹1 Then ₹299/month
sirf 15 din regular [just 15 days regular]
practice karo [practice]
fark nazar aayega. [will see the difference.]
Sach me? [Really?]
summary: A driver makes common English grammar mistakes while speaking, which are instantly corrected by an AI avatar representing the MySivi app. The AI explains that the app helps users improve fluency and confidence with just 15 days of practice. The ad concludes with a special trial offer of ₹1, prompting the driver to download the app immediately.
